findings.affected_capability: Native Windows build and test verification
findings.root_cause: Local host does not provide the native Windows build and test tools.
findings.remediation: Run the Windows solution and PowerShell build script on a Windows build host with the required toolchain.
findings.tests: Local clang++ C++20 tests passed; native Windows tests not run.

findings.affected_capability: Packaging, signing, install, and release validation
findings.root_cause: Release artifact workflow has not been executed for the Windows repo.
findings.remediation: Build, sign, verify, install, upgrade, uninstall, checksum, and record release artifacts.
findings.tests: Not run in this local environment.

findings.root_cause: The full upstream JSON/vector corpus is not yet consumed and executed by the Windows branch.
findings.remediation: Add a Windows-safe corpus source and runner, then execute every upstream canonical vector category.
findings.tests: Local tests cover all 512 realm identities and all 8192 state/codeword pairs; full upstream JSON/vector corpus not run.

findings.root_cause: The Windows product does not yet define persisted operational context, import/export formats, migrations, downgrade behavior, or deletion/reset behavior.
findings.remediation: Implement the typed data/configuration model and migration matrix, then add corruption, downgrade, import/export, and reset tests.

findings.root_cause: The branch currently exposes a native C++ core and tests, not a production Windows UI surface.
findings.remediation: Implement and test the Windows product UI/accessibility surface or record an owner-approved core-only product scope decision.
findings.tests: No UI or accessibility tests exist in this branch.

findings.root_cause: Product entry points, data flows, package/update trust, sensitive-data handling, and native build-output security review are not complete.
findings.remediation: Complete the product threat model, privacy mapping, unsafe API review, diagnostics redaction review, and package/update trust review.

findings.affected_capability: Supply chain, SBOM, dependency, and license evidence
findings.root_cause: A production Windows build has not been produced, so SBOM, checksums, toolchain provenance, and license evidence are incomplete.
findings.remediation: Generate SBOM and checksums from the production Windows build and record toolchain, SDK, package, license, and provenance evidence.

findings.root_cause: Performance budgets, Release-build measurements, cancellation checks, and failure-injection tests are not complete.
findings.remediation: Define budgets and run Release x64 and ARM64 performance, reliability, resource-limit, cancellation, and failure-injection tests.
findings.tests: Local semantic tests run; performance and reliability tests not run.

findings.root_cause: Required hosted checks, branch protection evidence, reproducibility evidence, release manifest, and owner release approvals are not complete.
findings.remediation: Run hosted checks, collect branch-protection evidence, produce release manifest and reproducibility evidence, and obtain required owner-controlled approvals after release blockers are closed.
findings.tests: Local protected-surface verification passed; hosted release gates not complete.
